primary_sources.title: SPR Official Results, 17th Sabah State Election, 29 November 2025
Sabah State Assembly dissolution proclamation, 6 October 2025
Merdeka Center post-election analysis, Sabah State Election 2025

notes: 17th Sabah State Election. GRS retained government with plurality (29 of 73 seats, 8 short of simple majority) requiring coalition partners. Pakatan Harapan reduced to 1 of 22 contested seats; DAP wiped out entirely (0 of 8 contested) — first absence from Sabah assembly since 2004. Chinese-majority seats (Luyang, Likas, Api-Api, Elopura, Sri Tanjung) swung to Warisan. 'Sabah First' narrative outperformed federal-affiliation appeals. The result has direct implications for Peninsular DAP coalition arithmetic — see analysis in T4A issue 1701.
